productDisplayName: Fila Men Swift White Sports Shoes
description: The fila Swift with its sleek upper and light weight makes for great Sports shoe that doubles as a casual shoe. UpperSynthetic and mesh upper Lacing system for a snug, customised FitPadded collar and tongue with a textile inner lining for optimum fit and comfortPadded footbed for all-day comfort, which is removable to accommodate an orthoticMesh liningMidsolePhylon midsole for comfort and impact protectionOutsoleDurable TPU outsole with geometrical lugs, a curved midfoot and a scooped heelShoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
